Representative_Docs_y: ['pay living wages lower food prices on campus offer more choices', 'increase our wages to keep up with inflation rates provide affordable healthy balanced meals on campus all the time during the week ', 'offer better wages it does not make sense that i can work at a fast food restaurant and make the same or less than i do working at a college', 'pay staff a higher wage provide healthier foods in cafeterias and other food outlets on campus subsidizing healthier options', 'pay a living wage full benefits and demand that any contractors doing business with university also pay a living wage and benefits immediately cease any contracts with companies that violate union busting laws bargain in good faith with all university workers unions do not participate in real estate deals that are likely to lead to gentrification foodhousing insecurity is not just a university problem work with statemunicipal government to to provide food security to all not just university community']

Name: 83_homeless_shelter_type_filling
Representative_Docs_x: ['providing housing for students facing homelessness  city shelters are often full or not applicable for students  a unm run shelter for students could look like a building dedicated to the sheltering of such students with transportation to campus provided if the shelter is off campus or the use of empty dorms around campus  providing a free meal once a day on campus for anyone with a valid unm id  ', 'in this small community the increase in homeless people has inclreased so much becuase of aprtments being unsafe there are even small children who attend elementary school and speak to the fact that they have no place to sleep and the only place they eat is at school during the day but there is no meals provided to them them in the evening weekends or holidays when the schools are no in session', 'we have a food pantry for college students to utilize but i feel that students feel shame for asking for help when it should not feel like that for anybody in general for housing insecurity we have students who live on campus but due to the nature of having to pass classes and keep financial aid is a requirement to live on campus but some students wait until the very last minute to ask for any type of assistance and end up being homeless because they lost their privilege to stay in the dorms there is no local homeless shelter large enough to house anyone who is struggling to find a place to stay and thats the problem theres plenty of churches being built in the town of farmington but no willingness to build a homeless shelter for those who wont abuse the help they get']
Representative_Docs_y: ['support community gardens not have torn down the unm student housing complex that could have housed many homeless', 'it would probably help our students if they could have help with filling in paperwork for hud housing or other low income housing on campus also some help in filling in any type of applications that are hard to understand for any type of low income support ', 'i think the university could set aside some student housing for students who are homeless in exchange for mandatory community service', 'find a way to use campus dorms for homeless on the old college of santa fe grounds', 'providing housing for students facing homelessness  city shelters are often full or not applicable for students  a unm run shelter for students could look like a building dedicated to the sheltering of such students with transportation to campus provided if the shelter is off campus or the use of empty dorms around campus  providing a free meal once a day on campus for anyone with a valid unm id  ']

Name: 86_cared_dorms_they_would
Representative_Docs_x: ['these are complex problems with no simple or single solution that said universities and colleges provide the opportunity for 1 community building 2 education prevention and awareness and 3 research into social and economic issues in order to find solutions in creating community universities could begin programs for students to find roommate matches or living situations either amongst each other or with willing foster families in the community alumni chapters could be a great place to start with this sort of approach', 'if we could have housing for students somehow i know that having dorms on campus is a long way off if at all and wouldnt solve the larger systemic problems of housing but i would love to see more housing options for students it would also be great if we had something once to twice a week with free meals some places ive lived larger cities have had hot meals provided by volunteer groups like food not bombs or even meals by donation by certain religious outreach groups ', 'our motto is icare which couldnt be further from the truth  administration tries to run the college like a business and only cares about the almighty   they are so antiemployee and antifaculty which impacts the entire campus  if they truly cared about our students they would provide more food resources for our students and more assistance in other areas when our students cant find housing our student achievement center hands the student a piece of paper with numbers for apartment complexes  if they cared they would actually make phone calls it would show they cared  i also would like to see some temporary emergency housing offered for our students']
Representative_Docs_y: ['provide safe  clean dorms for college students as well as more workstudy positions to help students help themselves', 'nmjc and state of nm could buy the vacant lea regional hospital building near campus turn the property into low income housing or dorms allow cafeteria access to residents ', 'if we could have housing for students somehow i know that having dorms on campus is a long way off if at all and wouldnt solve the larger systemic problems of housing but i would love to see more housing options for students it would also be great if we had something once to twice a week with free meals some places ive lived larger cities have had hot meals provided by volunteer groups like food not bombs or even meals by donation by certain religious outreach groups ', 'let me live in the dorm at a low price', 'i hope they can receive funding to build dorms and a cafeteria']
